section3.intro: Hi, I'm Luiz Ricardo, a WEB Programmer specialized in creating unique digital experiences to drive your business! Unlike many designers who use ready-made templates, I develop each site from scratch, 100% personalized to reflect your brand's identity and goals.

section4.title: Choose the Perfect Plan for Your Website's Success

maintenance.name: Annual Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Keep your site always online, secure and updated. Perfect for those who already have a site and value stability and continuous performance without technical headaches.

pro.name: Site PRO
pro.desc: A complete and high-performance website optimized for conversions. Ideal for professionals and businesses that want to stand out in the market with a custom-made solution.

institutional.name: Institutional Site
institutional.desc: A robust multi-page structure for complex businesses. Includes deep funnels, multiple sections, and complete brand positioning for high-ticket sales.

section5.title: Check out some projects I have developed

questions.q: What is your differential compared to others?
questions.a:
As a developer, I create real websites, all in code! Usually, other professionals who create sites are not programmers; they just use 'drag and drop' style programs, and the program generates the code automatically. What's the problem? Limitations! If you want something custom, you won't have it. If you want a movement effect, you won't have it. And many other limitations.

In addition, I have worked in large companies, where I acquired vast experience and advanced web development skills. This background allows me to offer high-quality and personalized solutions for each client.

questions.q: What is the difference between the plans?
questions.a:
Maintenance is for those who already have a site and need to make small changes.
Site Pro is for those who want to have a professional site.
Institutional Site is a site with multiple pages, perfect for those who need different sections and redirects, ideal for creating sales funnels.

If you are a legal professional, doctor, dentist or work in any other area as a freelancer, Site Pro is for you. But if you need a site that leads to other pages and allows for advanced sales schemes, such as for digital marketing, the Institutional Site is the ideal choice.

Websites take some time to be made because I need to know how you want the site so I can customize it to your liking. So, I create a sketch of the site so you can see what it will look like complete before it's even coded, like it's a photo of your ready site, but it will just be an image. Then, I will start programming from scratch until the final project.
